globalRules.turnCycleDefinition: One full round back to the same player; starts at the beginning of a player's turn.
globalRules.durationExpirationDefault: Beginning of the start player's turn after the specified turn cycles complete.
alchemyNotes: Modifier is separate from Atk. Modifier adds to both Hit Roll and Attack Damage Roll.
Atk adds only to Attack Damage Roll.
Damage die means roll that many D6 as instant/effect damage unless the card says attack damage.
Field detection is separated from Magic Type. Magic Type is Standard/Infinite/Lightning; Magic Subtype is None/Equip/Field.

cards.name: Blue Dragon
cards.text: When this creature hits, roll 1 die. If the result is 4-6, your target is frozen for 1 turn cycle and cannot inflict Atk damage or be sacrificed.

effects.actionText: When this creature hits, roll 1 die. If the result is 4-6, your target is frozen for 1 turn cycle and cannot inflict Atk damage or be sacrificed.
effects.notes: Effect roll pattern. Roll 1D6 after this creature hits. On 4-6, apply Frozen to the hit target.

cards.name: Smokescreen
cards.text: The equipped creature can only roll 1 Hit Die for the next 2 turn cycles.

effects.actionText: Target creature can only roll 1 Hit Die.

params.valueText: Target creature can only roll 1 Hit Die.
params.visualCue: Show max dice cap badge on the hit roll panel.

blockChain.label: Do
blockChain.notes: Hit dice caps are materialized on the creature and enforced during hit roll.

data.valueText: Target creature can only roll 1 Hit Die.

blockChain.label: Show
blockChain.summary: Show max dice cap badge on the hit roll panel.
blockChain.notes: This is the future tabletop/online-match presentation cue for this block chain.

effects.notes: Dice-limit effects are static battle modifiers, not DOT/HOT tick effects.

cards.notes: Smokescreen targets a creature on resolution. The source card can resolve to cemetery while the temporary dice-limit instance remains on the target.

cards.name: Troll Regeneration
cards.text: Equip to a creature. Immediately heal the equipped creature 5 HP. At the start of your turn, when you draw your card, heal the equipped creature 5 HP while this card remains equipped. This regenerating heal starts with 2 counters. At the end of the source owner's turn, add 1 counter while this card remains equipped.

effects.actionText: Apply Troll Regeneration-style healing to equipped creature
effects.value: 5 HP immediately, then 5 HP at the start of your turn when you draw

duration.text: Persistent while equipped; heals immediately; starts with 2 counters; ticks at the start of source owner turn; refreshes +1 at the end of source owner turn
Persistent while equipped; heals immediately; starts with 2 counters; ticks at the start of source owner turn; refreshes +1 at the end of source owner turn

effects.notes: Uses a separate Troll Regeneration-style healing handler, not the generic HOT/DOT runtime. Heals immediately when equipped, then heals 5 HP at the start of the source owner's turn during the Draw/start-turn window. Starts with 2 removable counters and refreshes +1 at the end of the source owner's turn while equipped. Cannot exceed max HP.

cards.notes: Troll Regeneration uses APPLY_REGENERATING_HEAL, a separate runtime from normal HOT.

cards.name: Silence From The Grave
cards.text: Discard 1 magic card to the cemetery to play this card. Destroy all magic cards on the field. For 2 turn cycles, your opponent cannot play magic cards and their creature effects are negated during your turn. The opponent may still respond with a valid Lightning card before this card resolves.

condition.text: Discard 1 magic card to cemetery as cost
Discard 1 magic card to cemetery as cost

effects.notes: Destroy all Magic cards on the field. Automated as all Magic Slot cleanup.

effects.value: Cannot play Standard, Infinite, Equip, Field, or Lightning Magic for 2 turn cycles after this card resolves

params.valueText: Cannot play Standard, Infinite, Equip, Field, or Lightning Magic for 2 turn cycles after this card resolves

effects.notes: Split handler. Opponent may respond before Silence resolves. After resolution, opponent cannot play any Magic cards, including Lightning, until the 2-turn-cycle lock expires.

effects.actionText: Negate opponent creature effects during your turns only
effects.value: Opponent creature effects negated only during the activating player turns

params.valueText: Opponent creature effects negated only during the activating player turns

effects.notes: Split handler. Suppression turns on during the Silence controller turns and off during the opponent turns. Creatures already unaffected by Magic ignore it. Replacement creatures brought in during the Silence controller combat are suppressed until their owner Draw/start turn.

cards.notes: Field card. Printed card number is 151/150.
